title: Rich Mexican Poblano Tacos
description: Buttery, light midnight craving tacos with roasted poblano peppers, lemongrass-infused sauce, and a crisp tortilla.
instructions: Roast poblano peppers under the broiler until charred on all sides, then peel and seed them.
Dice the roasted peppers and set aside.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat and add the bruised lemongrass stalk.
Cook the lemongrass for 1 minute until fragrant, then remove and discard the stalk.
Stir in chicken broth, smoked paprika, cumin, and salt, allowing the mixture to simmer for 3 minutes.
Add the diced poblano peppers to the skillet and cook until the sauce thickens, about 2 minutes.
Warm corn tortillas in a dry skillet for 30 seconds on each side.
Spoon the poblano mixture onto tortillas and sprinkle with shredded lettuce and diced onion.
Drizzle a squeeze of fresh lime juice over the tacos, if desired.
